# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: my-vpc
    type: gcp-types/compute_v1:network:
    properties:
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true
      name: my-vpc
      region: us-central1

  - name: my-subnet-frontend
    type: gcp-types/compute_v1:subnetwork:
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      name: my-frontend-subnet
      network: $(ref.my-vpc.selfLink)
      ipCidrRange: ''
    
  - name: my-subnet-backend
    type: gcp-types/compute_v1:subnetwork:
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      name: my-backend-subnet
      network: $(ref.my-vpc.selfLink)
      ipCidrRange: ''

  - name: my-subnet-database
    type: gcp-types/compute_v1:subnetwork:
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      name: my-database-subnet
      network: $(ref.my-vpc.selfLink)
      ipCidrRange: ''
